message:

+    "description": "Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts. This issue affects 57+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify helm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your helm installation:\n```bash\nhelm version --short\nhelm repo list\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant helm configuration:\nNested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts",
+        "description": "> Can [#12879](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/12879) or [#13654](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/13654) solve this?\n\nYes, these PRs fix the issue, with unit tests to prevent future breakage, and have been merged \ud83d\udc4f This fix is scheduled to be in Helm 3.17.1.\n```yaml\nfluentd:\n  livenessProbe:\n    httpGet: null\n    tcpSocket:\n      port: 24224\n    initialDelaySeconds: 20\n  readinessProbe:\n    httpGet: null\n    tcpSocket:\n      port: 24224\n    initialDelaySeconds: 20\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Nested `null` values do not remove keys from\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest helm to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "> Can [#12879](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/12879) or [#13654](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/13654) solve this?\n\nYes, these PRs fix the issue, with unit tests to prevent future breakage, and have been merged \ud83d\udc4f This fix is scheduled to be in Helm 3.17.1.",
